description: ECG Abnormalities Mode - Each slider controls the magnitude of a specific arrhythmia component

sliders.description: Normal heart rhythm components (P-wave, QRS complex, T-wave)
sliders.name: Normal Sinus Rhythm

sliders.description: Irregular atrial activity replacing P-waves with fibrillatory waves
sliders.name: Atrial Fibrillation

sliders.description: Wide QRS complexes with rapid ventricular rate
sliders.name: Ventricular Tachycardia

wavelet_recommendations.coif3: Coiflet-3 - good for detecting P and T waves
wavelet_recommendations.db4: Daubechies-4 - good for detecting QRS complexes
wavelet_recommendations.fourier: Standard FFT - good general-purpose frequency analysis
wavelet_recommendations.sym5: Symlet-5 - symmetric, good for ECG morphology analysis
